title: Improved Portals
description: Adds a glowing border to the portal from Fire Rekindled.
body: Uses optifine CTM to add a glowing border to the [Fire Rekindled](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/fire-rekindled) portal. Standalone pack, works wih any size. ___ Comparison with Legendary Portals [](https://modrinth.com/project/improved-portals)[](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/legendary-portals) ___ [](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/scrofae)
